message:
build(wasm): rebuild WASM artifacts with dotplot_self and inlined bytes

pkg/wasm_compute_bg.wasm:
- Recompiled with SequenceHandle.dotplot_self method
- Includes all new FFI exports

pkg/wasm_compute.js:
- Regenerated by inline-wasm-compute.ts script
- Contains base64-inlined WASM bytes for portability
- Uses top-level await for clean module initialization
- Supports both Node/Bun Buffer and browser atob decoding

pkg/wasm_compute_bg.wasm.d.ts:
- Add sequencehandle_dotplot_self export signature

pkg/package.json:
- Remove wasm_compute_bg.js from files (replaced by inlined wrapper)
- Remove wasm_compute.js from sideEffects (now pure after inlining)

These artifacts are committed to enable CI builds and deployments
without requiring a local Rust/wasm-pack toolchain.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,13 +5,11 @@
   "files": [
     "wasm_compute_bg.wasm",
     "wasm_compute.js",
-    "wasm_compute_bg.js",
     "wasm_compute.d.ts"
   ],
   "main": "wasm_compute.js",
   "types": "wasm_compute.d.ts",
   "sideEffects": [
-    "./wasm_compute.js",
     "./snippets/*"
   ]
 }
\ No newline at end of file
